title: Oct 2022 Potential Business Ideas — early-college brainstorm spreadsheet
html:
Oct 2022 Potential Business Ideas — early-college brainstorm spreadsheet

Source: 2022-10-05 Google Doc. The earliest captured "business ideas" doc in the Yahir corpus — junior-year OSU brainstorm. Establishes the early-college business-thinking baseline before Brotein / Rankett / BroMenu existed.

TL;DR

The doc is a brainstorm-style ideas list (47KB, mostly bullet points + image embeds — likely a long brainstorming session). Captures Yahir's pre-AI, pre-China business thinking. Themes overlap heavily with later notes:

  • Drive-thru / dispensary / cannabis combos — recurring through 2022 09 13 drive thru weed and 2024 12 28 ideas list.
  • Real-estate / wholesaling angles — surfaces again in the 2024 alt financing diligence.
  • App-based marketplace patterns — proto- of the stealth-apps era.
  • Family/mom-help business angles — same motivation root as the June 2022 mom list.

(The doc is largely image-embedded which limits text extraction; this summary captures structural shape rather than per-bullet content. Worth re-densifying after enabling image OCR.)

Pattern observed

This is the fossil layer of Yahir's business-ideation. Compare:

  • 2022-10-05 (this doc): generic, family-tied, real-estate + drive-thru exploration.
  • 2024 12 28: post-China, AI-flavored, BroMenu/Brotein/AI-SEO-shaped.
  • 2025 08 29: full-PRD on a single product.
  • 2026 04 27: operating a real business with partner pipeline.

The progression from broad-list-of-options (2022) → niched-and-built (2026) is the through-line of the founder-development arc. This doc is where it starts.

Open questions

  • What ideas in this doc actually got prototyped vs stayed as bullets?
  • The image embeds — what do they reference (sketches? screenshots?)? Recommend image OCR pass.

Related

  • 2024 12 28 ideas list — the post-China successor
  • 2024 09 28 thoughts real estate financing
  • 2022 09 13 drive thru weed
  • 2022 06 14 being then experience
  • brotein
  • rankett
  • founder development arc
  • osu

Note: this summary is structural-only because the source doc is heavily image-embedded. Recommend re-ingesting after enabling OCR or after a visual review pass to extract bullet-level idea content.
